name: Claude Code Greenfield SvelteKit
description: Create a new Gitea repo, scaffold a SvelteKit app, review the code, capture browser evidence, and open a PR — fully powered by Claude Code agent.

document.name: claude-code-greenfield-sveltekit
document.title: Claude Code Greenfield SvelteKit
document.summary: Repo creation, SvelteKit scaffold, review, browser preview, and PR — all via Claude Code agent.

with.prompt:
Set up the Git repository for this SvelteKit application.

Use ONE Bash tool call only. Copy this script exactly and do not rename the owner, repo, or paths:

set -euo pipefail
OWNER='{{trigger.owner}}'
REPO='{{trigger.repo}}'
DESCRIPTION='{{trigger.description}}'
API='http://gitea-http.gitea.svc.cluster.local:3000/api/v1'
CLONE_URL="http://giteaadmin:${GITEA_TOKEN}@gitea-http.gitea.svc.cluster.local:3000/${OWNER}/${REPO}.git"

if ! curl -sf "${API}/repos/${OWNER}/${REPO}" -H "Authorization: token ${GITEA_TOKEN}" >/dev/null; then
  curl -sS -X POST "${API}/user/repos" \
    -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
    -H "Authorization: token ${GITEA_TOKEN}" \
    -d "{\"name\":\"${REPO}\",\"description\":\"${DESCRIPTION}\",\"private\":false,\"auto_init\":true}"
fi

rm -rf "/tmp/${REPO}"
git clone "${CLONE_URL}" "/tmp/${REPO}"
cd "/tmp/${REPO}"
git config user.email 'claude@agent.local'
git config user.name 'Claude Code Agent'
if ! git rev-parse HEAD >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  printf '# %s\n' "${REPO}" > README.md
  git add README.md
  git commit -m 'Initial commit'
  git push origin main
fi

git remote -v
git log --oneline -3 || true
echo 'SETUP COMPLETE'

agentConfig.name: claude-setup
agentConfig.instructions: You are setting up a new Git repository. Use curl for API calls and git for repo operations.

agentConfig.name: claude-scaffolder
agentConfig.instructions: You are scaffolding a SvelteKit application. Use one exact Bash tool call to scaffold, write the demo page, build, commit, and push. Do not improvise extra steps.

with.prompt:
Ensure the scaffolded SvelteKit code is committed and pushed to the remote.

Use ONE Bash tool call only. Copy this script exactly and do not rewrite the repository identifiers:

set -euo pipefail
cd /tmp/{{trigger.repo}}
git add -A
git status
git diff --cached --stat
if ! git commit -m 'feat: scaffold SvelteKit demo app'; then
  echo 'nothing to commit'
fi
git push origin main --force
git log --oneline -3
git remote get-url origin
git ls-remote --heads origin main
echo 'PUSH COMPLETE'

Do not use curl for verification. Verify only with git remote output.

agentConfig.name: claude-commit-push
agentConfig.instructions: You MUST commit any uncommitted changes and force push to the remote. Run the commands exactly as given. Do not skip the push.

with.prompt:
Review the scaffolded SvelteKit code at /tmp/{{trigger.repo}}.

1. Read package.json to check dependencies
2. Read src/routes/+page.svelte to confirm the page matches this brief: {{trigger.ui_brief}}
3. Verify the build passes: cd /tmp/{{trigger.repo}} && npm run build
4. Check git log to confirm pushed commits: git log --oneline -5
5. Produce a brief review summary

Do NOT modify any files.

agentConfig.name: claude-reviewer
agentConfig.instructions: You are reviewing code. Read files, check the build, and produce a summary. Do NOT modify files.

with.command: cd /sandbox/{{trigger.repo}} && ls -la && npm install --prefer-offline 2>&1 && echo install-done

steps.label: Hero Reveal
steps.goal: Open the landing page and hold on the cinematic hero.

steps.label: Stealth Mode
steps.goal: Switch to the stealth presentation mode and show the alternate metrics.

steps.label: Clearance Boost
steps.goal: Raise the clearance slider to show live state change in the hero.

steps.label: Broadcast Mode
steps.goal: Pivot to the high-energy broadcast mode for the most dramatic metric palette.

steps.label: Metrics Grid
steps.goal: Frame the metrics cards as a clean product proof moment.

steps.label: Launch Reset
steps.goal: Return to the default launch state to close the demo loop cleanly.

captions.title: Mode Switching
captions.body: Switching modes instantly reframes the dashboard for a different launch scenario.

captions.title: Live Controls
captions.body: The clearance control gives the viewer an immediate sense of interactivity and state change.

captions.title: High-Energy View
captions.body: Broadcast mode turns the page into a bold reveal moment with punchier metrics and color.

captions.title: Visual Proof
captions.body: The metrics grid gives the video a strong proof frame with clear data beats and motion.

with.prompt:
Report the workflow completion.

1. cd /tmp/{{trigger.repo}}
2. Show the latest commits: git log --oneline -5
3. Show the repo URL: echo 'Repo: https://gitea-ryzen.tail286401.ts.net/{{trigger.owner}}/{{trigger.repo}}'
4. Summarize what was built for this brief: {{trigger.ui_brief}}
5. Mention that browser capture ran in demo mode with annotated video and captions enabled.

IMPORTANT: Always cd to /tmp/{{trigger.repo}} first.
